title: DEVCOM Army Research Laboratory
description: ARL regional sites create strong, enduring S&T partnerships–working together to solve the Army’s current and future challenges. ARL regional sites
text:
ARL regional sites create strong, enduring S&T partnerships–working together to solve the Army’s current and future challenges. ARL regional sites leverage regional expertise and facilities to accelerate the operationalizing of science.
Technical Focus Areas
Human Information Interaction
Contextual Analytics
Hybrid Human Interfaces
Integrated Analysis and Assessment
Joint Human-Agent Decision Making
Cybersecurity
Embedded Processing
Intelligent Systems
Peter Khooshabeh
Regional Lead
Inquiries can be submitted to: ARLWest@arl.army.mil.
